# Pavel Tyo — AI Engineer

> Freelance AI Engineer based in Almaty, Kazakhstan. Specializes in AI sales agents, voice bots, workflow automation, and landing pages.

## Services
- AI Agents (WhatsApp, Telegram bots with LLM) — from $800
- Automation (Make/n8n, 1C+CRM integrations) — from $500
- Landing Pages (design + code in 1 day) — from $300

## Experience
- 3+ years in AI/automation engineering
- 25+ production scenarios in Make/n8n
- 500+ operator-hours saved monthly
- Clients: Kazakhstan, Russia, UAE

## Tech Stack
AI: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, RAG
Voice: Tomoru, Twin, Aimylogic
Automation: Make, n8n, Zapier, Python
Web: React, Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
DB: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Firebase, Redis
Business: 1C API, amoCRM, Bitrix24, WhatsApp Business API
